title: 目標達成の後に・かすかな芽生え

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto fears that she'll be abandoned and
decides to leave on her own accord. However, I
convince her to stay, and we resume our training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her body's starting to show signs of entering the
race-ready state. If it continues, the Derby could
very well be our next goal. However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto is completely put off by the idea.
Her heart has yet to catch up with her body. We
go back to gaining gradual experience for the
time being.
